description: MAP-Elites behavioral archive — tracks ATLAS variants in 3D behavior space (planning_depth × tool_diversity × verification_rate, each 0-3 bin index)

planning_depth.description: Does the variant plan ahead multiple steps or react greedily?

tool_diversity.description: Does it use many tools in combination or rely on a narrow set?

verification_rate.description: How often does it self-check before committing?

variants.label: ATLAS-baseline
variants.notes: Seed variant — current master ATLAS, all capabilities enabled, no dialect restrictions
